task_completion.description: Open the community seed library inventory spreadsheet
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows a graphical spreadsheet application (e.g., LibreOffice Calc) open with the seed inventory data loaded.

task_completion.description: Calculate the age of the seeds
task_completion.visual_evidence: A column in the spreadsheet is populated with the calculated age of the seeds (derived from the collection dates).

task_completion.description: Reference the viability data from the second sheet
task_completion.visual_evidence: The formula bar shows a lookup function (e.g., VLOOKUP) referencing the viability ranges, or the agent is seen actively viewing the reference sheet.

task_completion.description: Determine the viability status for the seeds
task_completion.visual_evidence: A column in the spreadsheet explicitly categorizes the seeds with the exact labels 'Good', 'Test', or 'Discard'.

task_completion.description: Apply calculations and status to all 20 seed entries
task_completion.visual_evidence: The age and viability status columns are completely filled out for all 20 seed entries (typically down to row 21, accounting for the header), including handling the Zucchini entry.

integrity.description: Agent used the GUI spreadsheet application to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with the spreadsheet software's interface rather than using terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: Agent used formulas rather than hardcoding answers
integrity.visual_evidence: The formula bar shows actual spreadsheet formulas for age calculation and status determination, rather than manually typed static values.

integrity.description: Agent modified the actual inventory file
integrity.visual_evidence: The work is done within the provided ODS file, not in a separate text document or terminal output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The inventory contains exactly 20 seed entries (S001 to S020) with collection dates ranging from 2018-04-05 to 2024-03-22. The reference sheet contains viability ranges for Tomato, Lettuce, Bean, Squash, Pepper, and Herb. CRITICAL: 'Zucchini' (S004) is present in the inventory but intentionally missing from the reference data, which will cause standard lookup formulas to fail. The agent must successfully calculate seed age and assign a status of 'Good', 'Test', or 'Discard' for the entries.
